metadata.description: Personal engineering operating system — full project lifecycle from brainstorming to maintenance. Tailored for solo/small-team development with Claude Code.

plugins.name: halli-workflows
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle development workflows: kickoff brainstorming, design, plan, implement, review, diagnose, maintain, retro. 23 specialized agents, 15 skills, stack-aware with presets for Next.js, Expo, Hono, and more.
